name: io.github.n24q02m/better-telegram-mcp
description: Telegram MCP server — dual-mode Bot API + MTProto, 6 composite tools.

environmentVariables.description: Telegram bot token from @BotFather (for bot mode)
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Telegram API ID from my.telegram.org (for user mode)
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_API_ID

environmentVariables.description: Telegram API hash from my.telegram.org (for user mode)
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_API_HASH

environmentVariables.description: Telegram bot token from @BotFather (for bot mode)
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
